ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weighting factor for the household in analyses */,
  "subsid" INTEGER /* Subsidy status of the household */,
  "soc" TEXT /* Socioeconomic category */,
  "ret" TEXT /* Retirement status */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the household head */,
  "age_grp" TEXT /* Age group of the household head */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of residence */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the household head */,
  "tenure" TEXT /* Tenure type (e.g., owned, rented) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the household head */,
  "num_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the household */,
  "num_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income for the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "fihhyr2" TEXT /* Household income range */,
  "pubsecty" TEXT /* Public sector employment status */,
  "mastat" TEXT /* Marital status of the head of the household */,
  "huresp" TEXT /* Housing response status */,
  "educ" TEXT /* Educational attainment level */,
  "monthly_expenses" REAL /* Total monthly expenses of the household */,
  "debt_to_income_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-income ratio of the household */,
  "savings_ratio" REAL /* Savings ratio of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for savings data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "saveamount" REAL /* Amount saved by the household */,
  "hsval" TEXT /* Household savings value range */,
  "mg1tot" REAL /* Total savings amount */,
  "emergency_fund" TEXT /* Presence of an emergency fund */,
  "retirement_savings" TEXT /* Presence of retirement savings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debt" (
  "debt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for debt data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "stdebt" REAL /* Standard debt amount */,
  "xpus" REAL /* Debt used to income ratio */,
  "condebt" REAL /* Conditional debt amount */,
  "debt_type" TEXT /* Type of debt */,
  "debt_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debt_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concerns" (
  "concern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for concerns data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "whycondebt1" TEXT /* First reason for concern about debt */,
  "whycondebt2" TEXT /* Second reason for concern about debt */,
  "whycondebt3" TEXT /* Third reason for concern about debt */,
  "financial_stress_level" TEXT /* Level of financial stress experienced by the household */,
  "reasons_for_concerns" TEXT /* Reasons for concerns about debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concerns_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debt_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for actions data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "actdebt1" TEXT /* First action taken regarding debt */,
  "actdebt2" TEXT /* Second action taken regarding debt */,
  "actdebt3" TEXT /* Third action taken regarding debt */,
  "debt_counseling" TEXT /* Whether the household has received debt counseling */,
  "debt_management_plan" TEXT /* Presence of a debt management plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debt_actions_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortgages" (
  "mortgage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for mortgage data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "nomortgage" TEXT /* Mortgage status */,
  "refmortg1" TEXT /* First reference mortgage type */,
  "refmortg2" TEXT /* Second reference mortgage type */,
  "mortgage_type" TEXT /* Type of mortgage */,
  "mortgage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mortgage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortgage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortgages_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spending" (
  "spending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for spending data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "hpspend" TEXT /* Household spending status */,
  "hhincfall" TEXT /* Household income fall situation */,
  "entertainment_expenses" REAL /* Monthly entertainment expenses */,
  "grocery_expenses" REAL /* Monthly grocery expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spending_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for employment data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "jbstat" TEXT /* Job status of the household head */,
  "mlender" TEXT /* Mortgage lender type */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the household head is employed */,
  "job_security" TEXT /* Job security level of the household head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for savings behavior data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "savingch" TEXT /* Change in savings behavior */,
  "hscntcr1" TEXT /* Household savings consideration */,
  "savings_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of saving */,
  "savings_method" TEXT /* Method of saving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_behavior_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial status data entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household ID */,
  "betterworse2006" TEXT /* Change in financial status from 2006 */,
  "betterworse2020" TEXT /* Change in financial status from 2020 */,
  "long_term_outlook" TEXT /* Long-term financial outlook of the household */,
  "short_term_outlook" TEXT /* Short-term financial outlook of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_status_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)
